response.justification: Bogdan brings 17 years of broad software engineering experience with clear TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS CDK proficiency, and recent exposure to MCP server development and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years of production AI experience, and his AI work only begins in April 2025—a very recent pivot rather than an established specialization. Python, the dominant language for AI/ML tooling, is absent from his skill set. There is no evidence of vector database usage, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI. The forward-deployed nature of the role also demands demonstrable customer-facing technical leadership, which is not substantiated in the resume.
strengths: 17-year software engineering career with staff-level roles, demonstrating technical depth and leadership across multiple companies and domains
Recent hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq, directly aligned with key technologies listed in the JD
Proven ability to operate across full-stack and cloud environments, including AWS CDK and large-scale data integration work handling millions of requests
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list despite being a primary required language for AI/ML engineering in this role
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation and optimization techniques—core technical requirements of the position
Effective AI experience is under 2 months (April 2025 onward), far short of the 8+ years of production AI development the role explicitly requires
